conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 10 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a high volume or burden of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="263 (66.2%)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text on page 4 states: 'In terms of tumor volume, 263 patients (66.2%) in the combination arm... had high-volume disease.' Table 1 also shows 263 patients for 'High volume' in the 'ADT Plus Docetaxel' arm."
  B: value="263 (66.2%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 3, 'High volume' row, 'ADT Plus Docetaxel' column, 'No. of Patients' is 263. Confirmed by text on page 4: '263 patients (66.2%) in the combination arm... had high-volume disease.'"

---
Column 2: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the clinical trial with high volume/burden metastasis? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="250 (63.6%)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text on page 4 states: '...and 250 patients (63.6%) in the ADT alone arm had high-volume disease.' Table 1 also shows 250 patients for 'High volume' in the 'ADT Alone' arm."
  B: value="250 (63.6%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 3, 'High volume' row, 'ADT Alone' column, 'No. of Patients' is 250. Confirmed by text on page 4: '250 patients (63.6%) in the ADT alone arm had high-volume disease.'"

---
Column 3: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial with low volume/burden metastases? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="143 (36.4%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="Table 1, under 'ADT Alone' and 'Low volume', reports 'No. of Patients' as 143. The total patients in the ADT alone arm were 393 (from Fig 1 and text on page 4). The percentage is (143/393)*100 = 36.39%."
  B: value="143 (36.4%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 3, 'Low volume' row, 'ADT Alone' column, 'No. of Patients' is 143. Percentage calculated as (143/393) * 100 = 36.39%, rounded to 36.4%. Total patients in control arm is 393 (from Fig 1 on page 2)."

response.formatted_chunks:
[Page 4]
## Page 4

Long-Term Survival Analysis of CHAARTED Trial



and 393 in the ADT alone arm. This report represents data with
a cutoff date for survival of April 23, 2016, resulting in a median
follow-up of 53.7 months. Treatment groups were well balanced, as
previously described. The median age was 64 years (range, 36 to 88
years) in the combination arm versus 63 years (range, 39 to 91
years) in the ADT alone arm. In terms of tumor volume, 263
patients (66.2%) in the combination arm and 250 patients (63.6%)
in the ADT alone arm had high-volume disease. Furthermore, 289
patients (72.8%) in the combination arm versus 286 patients
(72.8%) in the ADT alone arm had had no PLT and were considered
to have de novo metastatic disease.



Efficacy
At the time of this analysis, there were 188 deaths in the combination arm and 211 deaths in the ADT alone arm. For the overall population, the median OS was 10.4 months longer in the combination arm (57.6 v 47.2 months; HR for death in the combination arm, 0.72; 95% CI, 0.59 to 0.89; P = .0018; Table 1; Fig 2). Longer follow-up confirmed that the effect of docetaxel was more pronounced for patients with high-volume disease. In this prospectively defined subgroup, with a median follow-up of 53.7 months, there was a median OS benefit of 16.8 months (median OS, 51.2 v 34.4 months; HR for death in the combination
